flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mountain Gateway Community College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (511 → 425).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mountain Gateway Community College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (24.5% → 21.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mountain Gateway Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
